nonBlockingIssues.description: SuperadminRuntimePage RuntimePolicySection loads platform-wide metrics but doesn't fetch company-specific policy data before populating the draft form. The form initializes with aggregate metrics values, not per-company policy values.
When loadMetrics fails in SuperadminRuntimePage, the error is silently swallowed without setting an error state for user feedback.
ModuleConfigModal initializes enabledModules to empty array instead of loading current tenant module state. Admins must re-select all desired modules each time, risking accidental module disabling.
Module configuration tests verify API method existence but don't fully exercise the ModuleConfigModal component UI flow.
Force-reset tests verify API method exists but don't fully test the dialog confirmation flow.

appliedUpdates.description: Added pinned admin/superadmin contract notes: tenant runtime paths, dual-vocabulary lifecycle states, admin vs superadmin endpoint pattern, module configuration limitations, force-reset password behavior. Updated ERP-11 tracking to note write path resolved.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance for read-only admin surface UX pattern: Use Lock icon + explanatory text when admin surfaces should be read-only due to superadmin-only mutation permissions. This pattern is now consistent across RolesPage, SettingsPage, and TenantRuntimePage.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: admin-user-role-runtime-alignment feature implemented this pattern across 3 pages with consistent styling.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit guidance on acceptable alternatives when interactive agent-browser verification is blocked by infrastructure (backend unavailability). Current guidance says to verify with agent-browser but doesn't specify fallbacks. The worker appropriately relied on comprehensive test coverage when backend was unavailable.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: admin-user-role-runtime-alignment documented this deviation in skillFeedback.suggestedChanges.

admin-user-role-runtime-alignment.summary: Correctly aligns admin/superadmin RBAC boundaries. Superadmin runtime uses canonical paths. Admin surfaces are read-only with clear notices. 1130 tests pass.

admin-lifecycle-module-onboarding-alignm.summary: Correctly handles dual-vocabulary lifecycle states, force-reset with proper masking, and module configuration API wiring. 1137 tests pass.

admin-changelog-and-export-approvals.summary: Successfully rewrote ChangelogPage from localStorage to backend API with full CRUD. 30 tests for changelog/export-approvals. No blocking issues.

support-and-credit-cross-surface-consist.summary: Clean implementation of cross-surface consistency for support tickets (VAL-CROSS-005) and credit requests (VAL-CROSS-006). 19 new tests pass.
